# Framont Access

> Framont Access is the investment product platform of Framont & Partners Management Ltd — a Malta-based management company licensed by the Malta Financial Services Authority (MFSA) under the Investment Services Act (Cap. 370) and authorised as a UCITS management company and Alternative Investment Fund Manager (AIFM) under the AIFMD. The platform gives eligible investors curated access to institutional-grade investment products: investment funds, actively managed certificates (AMCs), exchange traded instruments (ETIs) and selected private market deals.

Key facts:

- Operator: Framont & Partners Management Ltd., Dragonara Business Centre, 5th Floor, Dragonara Road, San Ġiljan STJ 3141, Malta (VAT MT22666318)
- Corporate site: https://www.framontmanagement.com/
- Platform: https://access.framontmanagement.com/ (English and Italian)
- Access model: product details unlock with free registration; the Deals section is reserved for vetted investors
- Nothing on the site is investment advice or a public offer; products are intended for eligible investors and subject to jurisdiction restrictions

## Listed products

- [HERAKLIT Strategy ETI](https://heraklit.framontmanagement.com/): exchange traded instrument, ISIN DE000AMC0D44, listed on Börse Stuttgart
- [Tech Megatrend Tactical ETI](https://techmegatrend.framontmanagement.com/): exchange traded instrument, ISIN DE000AMC0D85
- [LC Invest — Value Edge ETI](https://lcinvest.framontmanagement.com/): exchange traded instrument, ISIN DE000AMC0BZ5
- [IVN Global ETI](https://ivncapital.com/): exchange traded instrument, ISIN DE000AMC0DX6, actively managed global long/short strategy across equities, currencies, commodities and digital assets
- [Noctiluca Capital AMC](https://access.framontmanagement.com/assets/termsheets/framont-noctiluca-amc-termsheet.pdf): actively managed certificate, ISIN CH1554882477, for professional investors — official term sheet (PDF)
- [Zalphyx Yield Strategies CLN](https://access.framontmanagement.com/assets/termsheets/framont-zalphyx-cln-termsheet.pdf): 6% p.a. credit-linked note, ISIN CH1518693374, for professional and qualified investors — official term sheet (PDF)

## Guides (English)

- [What Is an Exchange Traded Instrument (ETI)?](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/what-is-an-eti.html): how ETIs are issued and collateralised, how they differ from ETFs, AMCs and funds, and how to buy one
- [Actively Managed Certificates (AMC), Explained](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/amc-actively-managed-certificates.html): structure, costs, risks and use cases of AMCs
- [How to Evaluate a Systematic Strategy Before You Invest](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/how-to-evaluate-systematic-strategies.html): a due-diligence checklist for systematic strategies
- [Insights hub](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/)

## Guide (Italiano)

- [Cos'è un Exchange Traded Instrument (ETI)?](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/it/cos-e-un-eti.html)
- [Actively Managed Certificates (AMC), spiegati](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/it/amc-certificati-gestione-attiva.html)
- [Come valutare una strategia sistematica prima di investire](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/it/valutare-strategie-sistematiche.html)
- [Hub Insights in italiano](https://access.framontmanagement.com/articles/it/)
